summary: Leads Status Filter feature fully tested. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified the status dropdown filter with all 4 options (All Status, Active, On Hold, Deactivated). localStorage persistence confirmed working.
passed_tests: 1. Backend - GET /api/leads without hold_status filter returns all leads - PASSED
2. Backend - GET /api/leads?hold_status=all returns all leads - PASSED
3. Backend - GET /api/leads?hold_status=Active returns only active leads (including null hold_status) - PASSED
4. Backend - GET /api/leads?hold_status=Hold returns only leads on hold - PASSED
5. Backend - GET /api/leads?hold_status=Deactivated returns only deactivated leads - PASSED
6. Backend - Active + Hold + Deactivated counts equal total leads - PASSED
7. Backend - hold_status filter works with time_filter - PASSED
8. Backend - hold_status filter works with sorting - PASSED
9. Backend - PUT /api/leads/{id}/hold-status to put lead on hold - PASSED
10. Backend - PUT /api/leads/{id}/hold-status to activate lead - PASSED
11. Backend - PUT /api/leads/{id}/hold-status to deactivate lead - PASSED
12. Frontend - Status dropdown shows 4 options: All Status, Active, On Hold, Deactivated - PASSED
13. Frontend - Selecting 'Active' shows only active leads (5 leads) - PASSED
14. Frontend - Selecting 'On Hold' shows only leads on hold (1 lead) - PASSED
15. Frontend - Selecting 'Deactivated' shows only deactivated leads (1 lead) - PASSED
16. Frontend - Clear filters button resets status filter to 'All Status' - PASSED
17. Frontend - Filter persists in localStorage after page reload - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly implements hold_status parameter on GET /api/leads endpoint (line 5290)
Active filter correctly handles leads with null hold_status (treated as Active)
Frontend AdvancedFilters.jsx correctly shows status dropdown with showHoldStatus={true}
localStorage persistence works via saveFiltersToStorage/loadFiltersFromStorage utility functions
Hold/Deactivated badges correctly displayed on lead rows in the table
seed_data_creation: Created test leads with Hold and Deactivated status for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leads Status Filter feature is complete and working. The Leads page now has a status dropdown filter matching the Projects page. Filter options: All Status, Active, On Hold, Deactivated. localStorage key: arkiflo_leads_filters. Backend endpoint: GET /api/leads?hold_status=Active|Hold|Deactivated
